ec2.network.interface.attachment.DeleteO.Docs: Whether to delete the network interface when the instance terminates. By default, this value is set to `true`.

ec2.network.interface.attachment.DeviceI.Docs: The network interface's position in the attachment order. For example, the first attached network interface has a `DeviceIndex` of 0.

ec2.network.interface.attachment.Instanc.Docs: The ID of the instance to which you will attach the ENI.

ec2.network.interface.attachment.Network.Docs: The ID of the ENI that you want to attach.
